name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Press Esc to close any popup — entry forms, the bank and member windows, detail popups, confirmations, the account menu and the delete-company window.
If a dropdown is open inside a window, Esc closes the dropdown first, then the window on the next press.
